features: 【Rechargeable & Long-lasting】 Walkie talkies are equipped with built-in rechargeable 1000mAh lithium-ion batteries and a 2-in-1 USB Type-C charging cable. The walkie-talkie can stay in standby mode for 3–4 days after a full charge. Compared with others that use AAA batteries, the AWANFI rechargeable walkie talkie is safer, more economical, and longer-lasting, and it can be recharged quickly at any time.

【Multifunction & Easy to Use】Walkie talkies for kids have clear buttons and a bright LCD screen. The grooved design on both sides makes them easy to grip. With a lanyard and belt clip, they can be easily used by children aged 3–12. Simply set the same channel and sub-code, then press the PTT button to talk—it's very easy to operate. The walkie-talkies support many advanced features such as VOX-hands free function, auto power saving, low battery alert, keyboard lock, and drop protection (ABS).

【Long Range Walkie Talkie】 AWANFI 2-way radios use an advanced chipset that delivers long-distance and clear audio transmission with stable signals. These walkie talkies can reach up to 3 km in open areas, allowing you to stay connected with friends and family. Even without mobile phones, communication is easy and reliable. (Actual range may vary depending on the environment.)

【Flashlight & SOS Functions】The kids' walkie talkies are equipped with a built-in flashlight, ideal for night-time adventures and emergency situations. They can be used as camping accessories or fun toys for children to explore in the dark. The walky talky also features an SOS function. After turning on the walkie-talkie, press and hold the ‘SOS’ button to trigger an alarm sound and flashing light—alerting all users on the same channel.

【One-to-many Communication】AWANFI walkie talkies for kids support 8 channels and 99 privacy codes, enabling secure one-to-one and one-to-many communication. These kids walkie talkies are compatible with most other brands—just set the same channel and code to stay connected. Whether you're using a walkie talkie long range outdoors or chatting in a group at home, AWANFI ensures clear and private signals. Each box includes a 2-pack, perfect for siblings, friends, or parent-child interaction with your walky talkie set.

【Best Choice】 AWANFI walkie talkies for kids are the perfect toys for boys and girls, promoting fun, teamwork, and quality time with family. Whether cycling, hiking, or camping, these long range and rechargeable walkie talkies deliver endless outdoor adventures for children.
description: Product Description AWANFI GL-528 walkie talkie is compact, lightweight and easy to carry, you can stay connected with friends, family and team members at home, on the campsite, at a festival or simply hiking. With the included upgraded lithium battery, you can enjoy hours of interrupted outdoor activity for up to 24 hours. Also, you can power up your walkie talkies in a more convenient way with USB charging. It is includes key features such as LCD display, built-in flashlight, 10 call tone alerts, 8 channels, 99 privacy codes and up to 3 km range*, keypad lock, low battery alert, VOX and channel scanning, with no call charges. *Please note that range may vary depending on environment and actual range in built-up areas is estimated at around 1km. The pocket-sized rechargeable walkie talkies come with belt clips and lanyards, are very easy to set up with the help of a friendly user manual and are ideal for kids to use. Note: Please recharge the AWANFI GL-528 walkie talkie with a 5V/1A charger. What's In the Box: 2 x AWANFI GL-528 Walkie Talkies 2 x Belt Clips 2 x Lanyards 2 x 1000mAh Lithium Battery(inlcuded) 1 x 2-in-1 Type-C Cable General Model GL-528 Frequency Band PMR446 Tx Power 500mW Channels 8+99 privacy codes Range Up to 3km(subject to terrain and conditions) Weight 174 grams(with belt clip and battery) Features LCD display, LED torch, Channel scan, VOX Mechanical Keypad lock, Battery level indicator, Belt clip, Type-C port for charging Alerts 10 call tones, Keypad tones, Talk confirmation tone Power Rechargeable lithium battery(included)
